_notes.deploy.netlify_relink_test: 2026-05-20 — empty-effect commit to verify Netlify's GitHub App link rebuilds on merge to main (no user-facing change).
_notes.errors.rate_limited: TODO Story 7.4/2.6/9.3 — wire {seconds} from the 429 RFC 7807 body's retry_after_seconds field on the consumer side.
_notes.login.forgot_password_help: Story 1.5b — static copy points the user to the founder support line for R-OP1 recovery.
_notes.envelope_handover.body_amount_prefix+bod: Story 7.2 — these two keys are sentence fragments assembled in JSX around a styled <span> that renders the amount in primary-green bold. Concatenation order: body_amount_prefix · [styled amount + ' FCFA'] · body_recipient. Do NOT translate either fragment standalone — read EnvelopeHandoverScreen.tsx for the full sentence structure when localising to Wolof / Bambara (Story 1.5).

import.title: Importer depuis vos contacts
import.consent_body: Nous lisons vos contacts uniquement pour vous permettre d'en choisir. Aucune donnée ne quitte votre téléphone avant que vous ne validiez la liste finale. SafariCash ne stocke jamais votre carnet d'adresses.
